Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in LINC, which ranks #1 with a score of 95.4 and demonstrates extreme long-term momentum across all time horizons—returning 1,589.88% over 10 years, 527.67% over 5 years, and 158.29% over 1 year, all while outperforming SPY by 1,366.95% over the decade. LINC's momentum signal is clean at 0.54 with a "strong_buy" flag, passes all four key ratio tests, trades above all major moving averages, and shows the highest correlation to materials sector (XLB at 0.36), suggesting strength tied to cyclical/industrial themes. In contrast, MPC (Marathon Petroleum) ranks lower with a 10-year return of 555.67%—less than one-third of LINC's performance—and notably shows a problematic "bad_spy_score" of 0.4343, indicating weaker relative performance versus SPY despite solid absolute returns. The divergence between these two leaders suggests the market is currently rewarding secular growth stories (LINC) far more than cyclical value plays (MPC), even when both pass technical criteria and momentum filters.
